recentTweets.text:
Proud to preside over the House Floor this week as my @HouseGOP colleagues and I voted for the third time to send the SAVE America Act to the Senate.

We’re doing everything we can to get this important bill to @POTUS’s desk. https://t.co/Zpb2Xfb3HF

An overwhelmingly bipartisan bill to end daylight saving time passed the House yesterday.

@VernBuchanan’s legislation supports the law that the Texas Legislature passed last session to end this outdated practice of springing forward and falling back. https://t.co/j2vHDcdKl9
RT @HouseCommerce: Improving the quality of Medicaid care and lowering costs doesn’t have to be an either-or decision — we can have both.…

Republicans can improve Medicaid care while reducing costs. My Better Care, Better Cost Act would do both, saving taxpayers up to $9 billion a year.

Read more in my piece in @thehill ⬇️
https://t.co/IXSCkLc1Jz

Worth the watch. 250 years ago, the Founders established our great nation based on the rights, freedoms, and liberties endowed to all men. Since then, generations of Americans have fought and died to preserve those freedoms. 

There is far more that unites us than divides us. https://t.co/AwXv4KKtYl

One year ago, my @HouseGOP colleagues and I passed the Working Families Tax Cut. This historic bill delivered:

✅ No tax on tips
✅ No tax on overtime 
✅ Tax cuts for small businesses 
✅ Expanded the Child Tax Credit https://t.co/DVArKvQtbu

Gas prices are coming down. It’s simple, the greater supply of oil the lower the cost of gas. But gas prices will stay higher in blue states because of their costly gas taxes. 

My @HouseGOP colleagues and I will continue to unleash U.S. energy production and lower gas prices. https://t.co/naAuJYPJpG

RT @HouseCommerce: Texas remains a leader when it comes to technological innovation.  
 
As @RepCraigGoldman told Administrator @ArielleRot…

It was great to meet Chloe Christian from Arlington Heights High School and to honor her as the winner of this year’s Congressional Art Competition for TX-12!

Her artwork will hang in the U.S. Capitol, showcasing the incredible talent in our community. https://t.co/lQxQbcFB1H

Today in an overwhelmingly bipartisan vote my colleagues and I passed the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act.

This bill will help expand America’s housing supply by cutting red tape, streamlining programs, and empowering local banks to support the American Dream of homeownership. https://t.co/rV1ONOt6rY

Texas does it right. The Better Care, Better Cost Act would take a proven Texas policy and make it the national standard.

My bill could improve patient care while saving taxpayers up to $9 billion each year. https://t.co/uvkwJxlwSE

We want less war and more peace in the Middle East.

I’m grateful to my many colleagues who have joined me in advancing this goal through the Abraham Accords Expansion Act.
https://t.co/MrD08YFVLp

President Trump’s Abraham Accords expanded America’s leadership and countered the influence of our adversaries around the world.

I’m proud to author a bipartisan bill to help encourage more nations to join the Accords.
https://t.co/fqisRHz3yF

Today, my @HouseGOP colleagues and I voted to fund the Border Patrol and ICE. Every Democrat voted against providing the resources needed to secure our border, arrest dangerous illegal immigrants, combat fentanyl trafficking, and keep Americans safe. https://t.co/JvyMkQ8rxX

Waste, fraud, and abuse in Medicaid are costing taxpayers billions of dollars.

I’ll keep working to uncover and expose this massive waste so we can get federal government spending under control. https://t.co/Bb1HlNApOE

Great to join @POTUS, Kevin Hassett, @epaleezeldin, @ZachNunn, and @RepBice in the Oval Office today to support efforts to lower grocery prices.

Similar to my bill, H.J.Res. 75, these policies will repeal costly Biden-era rules that drive up food costs on Americans. https://t.co/kEkFdDvlDu

Major win today. The updated 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, led by @RepFrenchHill, passed with overwhelming bipartisan support.

My colleagues and I are working to implement @POTUS’ housing agenda and restore the American Dream of homeownership. https://t.co/z6ED9xZKfk

My team and I are here to serve you. If you need help resolving an issue with a federal agency, visit us at the Doss Heritage and Culture Center in Weatherford on May 27.

My team will be available in person to provide assistance. https://t.co/6WvahWI1XH

It’s remarkable what a difference an administration can make. The @WHFraudTF is uncovering massive waste, fraud, and abuse in taxpayer-funded Medicaid. We must end fraudulent spending and ensure Medicaid services go to Americans who truly need them.

Last week, I toured the tornado damage in Mineral Wells, and met with the Mineral Wells Economic Development Corporation and the Parker County Economic Development Council. Thank you to the Ventamatic and Parker teams for walking me through what remains of your businesses. https://t.co/o4R9LfARMm

Proud to join @RepArrington, @RepNateMoran, and all of my Texas GOP Caucus colleagues in affirming that states can and should defend their borders when the federal government pushes reckless open-border policies. https://t.co/9OM0R6eBNr

Serving my constituents in #CD12 is always my first priority. Proud that my team has helped return over $7 million to Texans in Parker and Tarrant Counties.

If you’re having issues with the federal government, don’t hesitate to reach out at https://t.co/IVBqoKCX35 https://t.co/VnpIEOoYqG

If you need to renew your passport, the @StateDept is hosting a passport application event in Dallas this weekend.

For more, visit https://t.co/8xb3psVTL8 https://t.co/2kJImXkUf8

Proud to have presided over the House Floor during the passage of DHS funding.

After 76 days of Democrats blocking funding for our national security, we can finally send support to TSA, Coast Guard, and Secret Service agents. We’re working to fully fund Border Patrol and ICE

Alongside my @HouseGOP colleagues, I’m proud to have voted for the Farm Bill, a major win for farmers and ranchers in my District, the State of Texas, and the whole nation. 

This bill strengthens U.S. food production, cuts red tape, and supports proven conservation methods. https://t.co/c1HWV27ORc

RT @RedCrossNTX: 🚨SHELTER OPEN🚨
The American Red Cross North Texas Region is actively responding to the latest wave of storms that moved th…

We continue to pray for the many families and businesses in Mineral Wells devastated by severe storms and tornado last night. Very thankful for the first responders, utility crews, and volunteers who are working tirelessly to help our community rebuild.
So glad to see @SBA_Kelly highlighting Chieffalo Americana, a great Fort Worth small business!
Amazing moment as four F35s, built by many incredible men and women in Texas’ #CD12, fly over the White House!
RT @WashTimesOpEd: "The evidence from both federal and state governments is crystal clear: when the government implements green energy regu…

Heartbroken to hear of the loss of life last night in Parker and Wise Counties. Please join me in praying for our North Texas neighbors who were impacted, injured, or displaced by the tornado and severe storms. Very grateful to the first responders on the ground supporting

Democrats imposed mountains of green energy red tape for new homes, driving up housing and utility costs.

Read my piece in @WashTimesOpEd about how I’m working to improve affordability.
https://t.co/67Uq42rU55

So good to spend time with @RepArrington, @RepPfluger, @BrooksLandgraf, and many new friends from the @MidlandChamber and @OdessaChamber. Always fun to see so many great Texans at the U.S. Capitol. https://t.co/3N3ArAAKcw

Unreliable green energy mandates put federal facilities, including military bases and hospitals, at risk.

I’m glad the @housegop passed @RepLangworthy’s Reliable Federal Infrastructure Act to ensure our federal facilities have dependable power. https://t.co/ZOJyIHKFoe

RT @JenningsShow: Scott Jennings sits down with @RepCraigGoldman on the @JenningsShow to discuss:

🇮🇷The latest on the Iran conflict 
🗳️The…

Democrats complain about energy affordability, but blue states intentionally drive up energy prices. 

California’s ridiculous regulations add an additional $2 per gallon of gas for consumers. https://t.co/xMFLXM4VZC

Congratulations @RepPfluger on the passage of your FENCES Act. I’m proud to have voted for this common sense bill to protect Texas companies and communities from being penalized for pollution originating in foreign countries.
Congratulations to @AmericanAir on your 100th anniversary! Founded and still headquartered in Fort Worth, American Airlines has a remarkable history of connecting people all over the world.

We need fewer taxes, not more. Proud to have helped secure major tax relief for hardworking Americans.

✅ No tax on tips 
✅ No tax on overtime
✅ Tax cuts on Social Security benefits
✅ Tax cuts for small businesses https://t.co/KMSjUSTaIO

Reminder that 212 Democrats voted against cutting your taxes, including getting rid of taxes on tips and overtime.

My @HouseGOP colleagues and I want to lower your taxes; Democrats want to raise them. https://t.co/ifyXF4O93y
Exactly right, @RepFedorchak. If the hardworking men and women who serve and protect our country aren’t getting paychecks, then neither should Members of Congress.

For years, Iran has attacked Americans, funded terrorist proxies, built deadly weapons, and chanted “Death to America.”

@POTUS’ effective efforts are dismantling the Iranian threat and making Americans safer. https://t.co/dKPjZ8m01r

Once again, Democrats voted against funding the Department of Homeland Security today. 

House and Senate Democrats continue to refuse to pay the men and women who protect our nation, but they seem content to use them as pawns in their political games. https://t.co/viM3bBZufB

Airport security lines are too long, and TSA agents are finding other jobs. Who can blame them? They aren’t getting paid because Democrats in Washington D.C. are blocking funding for the Department of Homeland Security.

Democrats are using the hardworking men and women who https://t.co/y09YjJypzY

Proud to have presided over the House Floor as @HouseGOP passed funding for @DHSgov.

We must ensure the security of our borders and the safety of Americans.
RT @RapidResponse47: 53 Democrats just voted against reaffirming that the Islamic Republic of Iran remains the world's largest state sponso…

Not since Ronald Reagan has a president of the United States made such bold and direct decisions to change the world for the better. 

For decades, the tyrannical Iranian regime has killed Americans, attacked U.S. allies, slaughtered its own civilians, and chanted “Death to

RT @GOPMajorityWhip: Gone are the days of the Democrats' Green New Scam making life unaffordable for Americans.

This week, the @HouseGOP p…

Democrats are jealous. They can’t point to one accomplishment from four years of the Biden Administration.

In just one year, @POTUS and Republicans have secured the border, lowered gas prices, reduced inflation, and delivered major tax relief. We’re just getting started! https://t.co/cSmOskFd9q

The Biden Administration’s green energy regulations drove up the cost of new homes. We must swiftly repeal this harmful federal government overreach.

I’m proud to lead this legislation to help restore the American Dream of homeownership and drive costs down.

RT @MannyRamirez_TX: Affordability isn’t a buzzword, it's a critical component of a successful society. 

A responsible government should b…

RT @RepPfluger: I proudly voted to pass @RepCraigGoldman's Homeowner Energy Freedom Act on the House floor
today. 

This legislation repeal…

RT @HouseGOP: Americans deserve homes they can afford.

@RepCraigGoldman’s bill does just that by CUTTING the regulations that add nearly $…

The Homeowner Energy Freedom Act has passed the House! I’m proud to lead this bill to help lower home prices and restore the American Dream of homeownership.

Thank you to all my colleagues who supported this important bill. https://t.co/y7GU5Jtdio
RT @HouseCommerce: The Homeowner Energy Freedom Act, introduced by @RepCraigGoldman finally undoes backdoor Biden-Harris Administration fos…

Hardworking Americans should be able to raise their families in homes of their own.

The Homeowner Energy Freedom Act is critical to restoring the American Dream of homeownership. https://t.co/13gkS6vB1d

The Biden Administration’s costly energy regulations drove up the price of new homes. Passing the Homeowner Energy Freedom Act will repeal these rules and help make housing more affordable for American families.

Enjoyed joining @ScottJenningsKY on the @JenningsShow. https://t.co/vZK121YUFX

Great news! The @WhiteHouse supports my bill, the Homeowner Energy Freedom Act. 

This important bill would repeal costly green energy regulations and help lower the cost of new homes. We must restore the American Dream of homeownership! https://t.co/oMQRJO0RtC
RT @HouseCommerce: This week, @HouseGOP is voting on @RepCraigGoldman’s Homeowner Energy Freedom Act and @RepRickAllen’s Home Appliance Pro…

The proven path to affordable energy is less red tape, not more.

https://t.co/DoFsfiyHLz

We are Making America Great Again! 🇺🇸 https://t.co/o9WwqzJgLS

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 22 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Craig A. Goldman. The social-media posture reads as security-first / counterterrorism frame because the strongest matched frame is security and counterterrorism language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around security and counterterrorism language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 2 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 22 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-07-01T21:18:21Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
